scripts.build: vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && cp dist/app.html dist/index.html && npm run sync:pages
scripts.sync:pages: mkdir -p assets images && cp -R dist/assets/. assets/ && if [ -d dist/images ]; then cp -R dist/images/. images/; fi && cp dist/404.html . && cp dist/og-cover.svg . && cp dist/robots.txt . && cp dist/sitemap.xml .
